case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. BRANDESE SILAS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SILAS, BRANDESE
ORDER PERMITTING SERVICE BY POSTING AND MAILING PURSUANT TO CCP 415.45

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT SILAS, BRANDESE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILAS, BRANDESE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 721 JERROLD AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED AUG-08-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SILAS, BRANDESE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED AUG-08-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
